---
title: "Merge + Impute non-focal genotypes by program"
author: "Marcos"
date: "2026-02-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```
#Libraries
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(here))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(data.table))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(vcfR))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(stringr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(vcfR))

```
#Project root
```{r}
here::here()
list.files(here("data","genotypic"), recursive = FALSE)


```
#WSM 
```{r}
# Choose ONE focal trial folder to start (WSU program files are stored under this focal trial)
focal_trial <- "AWY1_DVPWA_2024"

# Choose ONE program folder to start
program_folder <- "washington_state_university"

# Path where your non-focal VCFs live
p2d <- here("data", "genotypic", focal_trial, "nonFocal", program_folder)

# List VCFs
vcf_files <- list.files(p2d, pattern = "\\.vcf\\.gz$", full.names = TRUE)

length(vcf_files)
head(vcf_files, 3)

#Build a manifest and deduplicate the VCFs (keep only unique archived VCFs)

# Build a manifest from filenames
wsu_manifest <- tibble(vcf_path = vcf_files) |>
  mutate(
    file = basename(vcf_path),
    trial_id = as.integer(str_match(file, "trial_(\\d+)_")[,2]),
    protocol_id = as.integer(str_match(file, "_prot_(\\d+)_")[,2]),
    project_id  = as.integer(str_match(file, "_proj_(\\d+)_")[,2]),
    archived_file = str_match(file, "_proj_\\d+_(.*)\\.vcf\\.gz$")[,2]
  )

# How many unique archived VCFs do we actually have?
wsu_unique <- wsu_manifest |>
  distinct(protocol_id, project_id, archived_file, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  arrange(protocol_id, project_id, archived_file)

nrow(wsu_manifest)   # total files on disk
nrow(wsu_unique)     # unique archived VCFs to process

wsu_unique |>
  select(protocol_id, project_id, archived_file) |>
  distinct()

#Keep one file 
keep_file <- wsu_unique$vcf_path[1]
keep_file

#Delete the old files
dup_files <- setdiff(wsu_manifest$vcf_path, keep_file)
length(dup_files)     # should be 16

# delete the duplicates
file.remove(dup_files)

# re-check
length(list.files(p2d, pattern="\\.vcf\\.gz$", full.names=TRUE))


#Read that VCF and extract a numeric genotype matrix (0/1/2)


# 1) read VCF
vcf <- vcfR::read.vcfR(keep_file, verbose = FALSE)

# 2) extract GT calls (strings like 0/0, 0/1, 1/1)
gt <- vcfR::extract.gt(vcf, element = "GT", as.numeric = FALSE)

dim(gt)              # markers x samples
gt[1:3, 1:5]         # quick sanity check

# 3) convert GT -> dosage (0,1,2) with NA for missing
gt_to_dosage <- function(x){
  x <- gsub("\\|", "/", x)      # handle phased genotypes
  out <- rep(NA_integer_, length(x))

  out[x %in% c("0/0")] <- 0L
  out[x %in% c("0/1","1/0")] <- 1L
  out[x %in% c("1/1")] <- 2L

  # common missing encodings
  out[x %in% c("./.", ".|.")] <- NA_integer_
  out
}

dosage <- apply(gt, 2, gt_to_dosage)
dosage <- as.matrix(dosage)

dim(dosage)          # markers x samples
dosage[1:3, 1:5]


#Add marker IDs

# 1) marker IDs (CHROM:POS is a stable key for merging)
fix <- as.data.frame(vcf@fix, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
marker_id <- paste0(fix$CHROM, ":", fix$POS)

# ensure marker_id length matches rows
stopifnot(length(marker_id) == nrow(dosage))

# put marker_id as rownames
rownames(dosage) <- marker_id

# 2) sanity checks on dosage values
table(as.vector(dosage), useNA = "ifany")

# 3) missingness rates
marker_missing <- rowMeans(is.na(dosage))
sample_missing <- colMeans(is.na(dosage))

summary(marker_missing)
summary(sample_missing)

# show the worst 5 markers and worst 5 samples
sort(marker_missing, decreasing = TRUE)[1:5]
sort(sample_missing, decreasing = TRUE)[1:5]

any(duplicated(rownames(dosage)))


#Imputation mean imputation per marker
dosage_imp <- dosage

for(i in 1:nrow(dosage_imp)){
  marker_mean <- mean(dosage_imp[i, ], na.rm = TRUE)
  dosage_imp[i, is.na(dosage_imp[i, ])] <- marker_mean
}

# confirm no missing values remain
sum(is.na(dosage_imp))


#Saving

# save matrix
saveRDS(dosage_imp, here("data","genotypic",
                         focal_trial,
                         "nonFocal",
                         program_folder,
                         "geno_matrix_imputed.rds"))

# verify
file.exists(here("data","genotypic",
                 focal_trial,
                 "nonFocal",
                 program_folder,
                 "geno_matrix_imputed.rds"))


```

# UMN
```{r}

# =========================
# Settings (UMN)
# =========================
focal_trial     <- "24Crk_AY2-3"
program_folder  <- "university_of_minnesota"
p2d             <- here("data", "genotypic", focal_trial, "nonFocal", program_folder)
stopifnot(dir.exists(p2d))

manifest_csv <- file.path(p2d, "manifest_umn_nonfocal.csv")
stopifnot(file.exists(manifest_csv))

# =========================
# 1) Read manifest + sanity
# =========================
umn_manifest <- fread(manifest_csv) |> as.data.frame()

cat("Manifest rows:", nrow(umn_manifest), "\n")
cat("Manifest cols:", ncol(umn_manifest), "\n")

# This assumes your manifest has these columns (based on your file)
needed_cols <- c("best_protocol_id", "best_project_id", "vcf_file_name", "out_file")
stopifnot(all(needed_cols %in% names(umn_manifest)))

# Add explicit vcf path column (your manifest stores the downloaded file path in out_file)
umn_manifest <- umn_manifest |> mutate(vcf_path = out_file)

# =========================
# 2) Deduplicate VCF files on disk
#    Keep ONE file per unique archived VCF (prot+project+file_name).
# =========================
umn_keep <- umn_manifest |>
  distinct(best_protocol_id, best_project_id, vcf_file_name, .keep_all = TRUE)

keep_files <- umn_keep$vcf_path

# Files listed in manifest but not among the "keep" set
dup_files <- setdiff(umn_manifest$vcf_path, keep_files)

cat("Will delete duplicate VCF downloads:", length(dup_files), "\n")

# Only delete files that actually exist (safety)
dup_files_exist <- dup_files[file.exists(dup_files)]

if(length(dup_files_exist) > 0){
  ok <- file.remove(dup_files_exist)
  stopifnot(all(ok))
}

# Confirm what is left in the folder
vcf_files <- list.files(p2d, pattern="\\.vcf\\.gz$", full.names=TRUE)
cat("VCFs left on disk:", length(vcf_files), "\n")
stopifnot(length(vcf_files) == nrow(umn_keep))  # should match unique archived VCF count

# =========================
# Helpers
# =========================

# Convert a GT string (e.g. "0/1", "1|0", "./.") into ALT dosage 0/1/2, else NA
gt_string_to_dosage <- function(x){
  if(is.na(x) || x %in% c(".", "./.", ".|.")) return(NA_integer_)
  x <- gsub("\\|", "/", x)                 # ignore phase
  a <- unlist(strsplit(x, "/"))
  if(length(a) != 2) return(NA_integer_)
  if(any(a == ".")) return(NA_integer_)
  # If alleles aren't numeric (rare), return NA instead of error
  if(any(!grepl("^[0-9]+$", a))) return(NA_integer_)
  sum(as.integer(a))
}

# Read VCF and return dosage matrix markers x samples (integer 0/1/2/NA)
vcf_to_dosage <- function(vcf_path){
  vcf <- read.vcfR(vcf_path, verbose = FALSE)
  gt  <- extract.gt(vcf, element = "GT", as.numeric = FALSE)  # variants x samples (vcfR default)

  dosage <- apply(gt, c(1,2), gt_string_to_dosage)
  storage.mode(dosage) <- "integer"

  # Preserve names
  rownames(dosage) <- rownames(gt)
  colnames(dosage) <- colnames(gt)

  dosage
}

# Mean-impute by marker (row)
impute_by_marker_mean <- function(dosage){
  m <- rowMeans(dosage, na.rm = TRUE)
  m[is.nan(m)] <- NA_real_

  for(i in seq_len(nrow(dosage))){
    miss <- is.na(dosage[i, ])
    if(any(miss)){
      # If a marker is all-missing, rowMean is NA: keep NA? or set to 0?
      # Here: set to 0 to avoid NA in final matrix (you can change this).
      fill <- m[i]
      if(is.na(fill)) fill <- 0
      dosage[i, miss] <- fill
    }
  }
  dosage
}

# =========================
# 3) Process each VCF -> (dosage + QC + imputed) -> RDS
# =========================
out_dir <- file.path(p2d, "rds")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

results <- list()

for(vcf_path in vcf_files){

  message("Processing: ", basename(vcf_path))

  dosage <- vcf_to_dosage(vcf_path)
  stopifnot(all(dosage %in% c(0L,1L,2L,NA)))

  # QC summaries
  marker_missing <- rowMeans(is.na(dosage))
  sample_missing <- colMeans(is.na(dosage))

  dosage_imp <- impute_by_marker_mean(dosage)
  stopifnot(sum(is.na(dosage_imp)) == 0)

  obj <- list(
    source_vcf = vcf_path,
    n_markers  = nrow(dosage),
    n_samples  = ncol(dosage),
    missing_rate_matrix = mean(is.na(dosage)),
    marker_missing_summary = summary(marker_missing),
    sample_missing_summary = summary(sample_missing),
    # keep raw if you want; it can make RDS huge for GBS
    dosage_raw = dosage,
    dosage_imp = dosage_imp
  )

  stem <- basename(vcf_path) |> str_replace("\\.vcf\\.gz$", "")
  out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(stem, "_dosage_imputed.rds"))

  saveRDS(obj, out_file, compress = "xz")
  results[[basename(vcf_path)]] <- out_file

  message("Saved: ", out_file)
}

results

# =========================
# 4) Write RDS manifest
# =========================
rds_files <- list.files(out_dir, pattern="\\.rds$", full.names=TRUE)
stopifnot(length(rds_files) > 0)

manifest_rds <- lapply(rds_files, function(f){
  obj <- readRDS(f)
  data.frame(
    program_folder = program_folder,
    source_vcf = obj$source_vcf,
    rds_file = f,
    n_markers = obj$n_markers,
    n_samples = obj$n_samples,
    missing_rate_matrix = obj$missing_rate_matrix,
    file_size_mb = round(file.info(f)$size / (1024^2), 2),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}) |> bind_rows()

manifest_rds_path <- file.path(out_dir, "manifest_rds_umn.csv")
write.csv(manifest_rds, manifest_rds_path, row.names = FALSE)

manifest_rds_path
manifest_rds
```
# MSU
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(here)
  library(data.table)
  library(dplyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(vcfR)
})

focal_trial    <- "25_Big6_SVREC_SVREC"
program_folder <- "michigan_state_university"
manifest_file  <- "manifest_msu_nonfocal.csv"

p2d <- here("data","genotypic", focal_trial, "nonFocal", program_folder)
stopifnot(dir.exists(p2d))

man <- fread(file.path(p2d, manifest_file)) |> as.data.frame()

# identify chip VCF group (AgriSeq 4K)
msu_chip <- man |>
  filter(grepl("AgriSeq", best_protocol, ignore.case = TRUE)) |>
  distinct(best_protocol_id, best_project_id, vcf_file_name)

stopifnot(nrow(msu_chip) == 1)

prot_id   <- msu_chip$best_protocol_id
proj_id   <- msu_chip$best_project_id
file_name <- msu_chip$vcf_file_name

vcf_all <- list.files(p2d, pattern="\\.vcf\\.gz$", full.names=TRUE)

pattern <- paste0("prot_", prot_id, "_proj_", proj_id, "_", file_name)
vcf_hit <- vcf_all[grepl(pattern, vcf_all)]
stopifnot(length(vcf_hit) >= 1)

# keep exactly one copy (OPTIONAL deletion)
vcf_path <- vcf_hit[1]
# if (length(vcf_hit) > 1) file.remove(vcf_hit[-1])

# read + GT -> dosage
vcf <- read.vcfR(vcf_path, verbose = FALSE)
gt  <- extract.gt(vcf, element = "GT", as.numeric = FALSE)  # variants x samples

dosage <- apply(gt, c(1,2), function(x){
  if(is.na(x) || x %in% c(".", "./.", ".|.")) return(NA_integer_)
  a <- unlist(strsplit(x, "[/|]"))
  if(any(a == ".")) return(NA_integer_)
  sum(as.integer(a))
})
storage.mode(dosage) <- "integer"

stopifnot(all(dosage %in% c(0L,1L,2L,NA)))

# QC
qc_table <- sort(table(as.vector(dosage), useNA="ifany"), decreasing = TRUE)
marker_missing <- rowMeans(is.na(dosage))
sample_missing <- colMeans(is.na(dosage))

# drop all-missing markers, then mean-impute
keep <- rowSums(!is.na(dosage)) > 0
dosage_f <- dosage[keep, , drop = FALSE]

m <- rowMeans(dosage_f, na.rm = TRUE)
dosage_imp <- dosage_f
for(i in seq_len(nrow(dosage_imp))){
  miss <- is.na(dosage_imp[i, ])
  if(any(miss)) dosage_imp[i, miss] <- m[i]
}
stopifnot(sum(is.na(dosage_imp)) == 0)

# save
out_dir <- here("data","genotypic", focal_trial, "nonFocal", program_folder, "rds")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

stem <- str_replace(basename(vcf_path), "\\.vcf\\.gz$", "")
out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(stem, "_dosage_imputed.rds"))

obj <- list(
  source_vcf = vcf_path,
  program_folder = program_folder,
  protocol_id = prot_id,
  project_id = proj_id,
  file_name = file_name,
  n_markers_raw = nrow(dosage),
  n_markers_final = nrow(dosage_imp),
  n_samples = ncol(dosage_imp),
  qc_table_raw = qc_table,
  marker_missing_summary_raw = summary(marker_missing),
  sample_missing_summary_raw = summary(sample_missing),
  dosage_imp = dosage_imp
)

saveRDS(obj, out_file, compress = "xz")
stopifnot(file.exists(out_file))
out_file

#Inspect output
obj <- readRDS(out_file)
str(obj, max.level = 1)
X <- obj$dosage_imp
dim(X)
X[1:5, 1:6]

```
#University of Wisconsin
```{r}
focal_trial    <- "OHRWW_2025_SPO"                     # <-- change
program_folder <- "university_of_wisconsin"            # <-- change

p2d <- here("data","genotypic", focal_trial, "nonFocal", program_folder)
stopifnot(dir.exists(p2d))

# find the manifest automatically (you named them manifest_*_nonfocal.csv)
manifest_path <- list.files(p2d, pattern="^manifest_.*_nonfocal\\.csv$", full.names=TRUE)
stopifnot(length(manifest_path) == 1)

man <- fread(manifest_path) |> as.data.frame()

# show the genotyping platforms present
man |>
  count(best_protocol, best_protocol_id, best_project_id, vcf_file_name, sort=TRUE) |>
  print(n=50)



focal_trial    <- "OHRWW_2025_SPO"
program_folder <- "university_of_wisconsin"

prot_id   <- 299
proj_id   <- 11009
file_name <- "2025-12-16_14:44:02_fileoUdn"

p2d <- here("data","genotypic", focal_trial, "nonFocal", program_folder)
stopifnot(dir.exists(p2d))

vcf_all <- list.files(p2d, pattern="\\.vcf\\.gz$", full.names=TRUE)

pattern <- paste0("prot_", prot_id, "_proj_", proj_id, "_", file_name)
vcf_hit <- vcf_all[grepl(pattern, vcf_all)]

length(vcf_hit)
vcf_hit


# keep the first one, delete the rest
keep_file <- vcf_hit[1]
dup_files <- setdiff(vcf_hit, keep_file)

cat("Keeping:\n", keep_file, "\n\n")
cat("Deleting n =", length(dup_files), "\n")

file.remove(dup_files)

# confirm only 1 remains for that archived VCF
vcf_left <- list.files(p2d, pattern="\\.vcf\\.gz$", full.names=TRUE)
vcf_left <- vcf_left[grepl(pattern, vcf_left)]

length(vcf_left)
vcf_left



vcf_path <- vcf_left[1]

vcf <- read.vcfR(vcf_path, verbose = FALSE)
gt  <- extract.gt(vcf, element = "GT", as.numeric = FALSE)  # variants x samples

dim(gt)

# Convert GT -> dosage (0/1/2, NA)
dosage <- apply(gt, c(1,2), function(x){
  if (is.na(x) || x %in% c(".", "./.", ".|.")) return(NA_integer_)
  a <- strsplit(x, "[/|]")[[1]]
  if (any(a == ".")) return(NA_integer_)
  sum(as.integer(a))
})
storage.mode(dosage) <- "integer"

# QC: check values and missingness
stopifnot(all(dosage %in% c(0L,1L,2L,NA)))

qc_table <- table(as.vector(dosage), useNA = "ifany")
qc_table

marker_missing <- rowMeans(is.na(dosage))
sample_missing <- colMeans(is.na(dosage))

summary(marker_missing)
summary(sample_missing)

# count all-missing markers
sum(rowSums(!is.na(dosage)) == 0)

# 1) Drop markers that are all missing
keep <- rowSums(!is.na(dosage)) > 0
dosage_f <- dosage[keep, , drop = FALSE]

# 2) Mean-impute by marker (row)
m <- rowMeans(dosage_f, na.rm = TRUE)
dosage_imp <- dosage_f
for(i in seq_len(nrow(dosage_imp))){
  miss <- is.na(dosage_imp[i, ])
  if(any(miss)) dosage_imp[i, miss] <- m[i]
}
stopifnot(sum(is.na(dosage_imp)) == 0)

# 3) Drop monomorphic markers (variance = 0)
keep_var <- apply(dosage_imp, 1, function(x) var(x) > 0)
dosage_imp <- dosage_imp[keep_var, , drop = FALSE]

# 4) Summaries after filtering
c(
  n_markers_raw   = nrow(dosage),
  n_markers_after = nrow(dosage_imp),
  n_samples       = ncol(dosage_imp)
)


# ---- Save UW final matrix ----

out_dir <- here("data","genotypic",
                "OHRWW_2025_SPO",
                "nonFocal",
                "university_of_wisconsin",
                "rds")

dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

stem <- basename(vcf_path) |> str_replace("\\.vcf\\.gz$", "")
out_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0(stem, "_dosage_imputed.rds"))

obj <- list(
  source_vcf = vcf_path,
  program_folder = "university_of_wisconsin",
  protocol_id = 299,
  project_id = 11009,
  file_name = "2025-12-16_14:44:02_fileoUdn",
  n_markers_raw = nrow(dosage),
  n_markers_final = nrow(dosage_imp),
  n_samples = ncol(dosage_imp),
  dosage_imp = dosage_imp
)

saveRDS(obj, out_file, compress = "xz")

file.exists(out_file)

obj2 <- readRDS(out_file)
dim(obj2$dosage_imp)


```

#Kansas

```{r}

# =========================
# 2) PROCESS / IMPUTE / BUILD G
# =========================


# ---- Output folder ----
proc_dir <- here("data", "genotypic", focal_trial_folder, "nonFocal",
                 program_folder, "processed_rds")
dir.create(proc_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---- Helper: enforce unique variant IDs in a vcfR object ----
make_vcf_variant_ids_unique <- function(vcf){
  key <- paste(vcf@fix[, "CHROM"], vcf@fix[, "POS"], vcf@fix[, "REF"], vcf@fix[, "ALT"], sep=":")
  key <- make.unique(key)
  vcf@fix[, "ID"] <- key
  rownames(vcf@fix) <- key
  vcf
}

# ---- Helper: convert GT -> ALT-count dosage (0/1/2), counts any ALT allele (>0) ----
gt_to_altcount <- function(x){
  if (is.na(x) || x %in% c(".", "./.", ".|.")) return(NA_integer_)
  a <- strsplit(x, "[/|]")[[1]]
  if (any(a == ".")) return(NA_integer_)
  a <- as.integer(a)
  as.integer(sum(a > 0))
}

# ---- Helper: mean-impute per marker after filtering ----
mean_impute_by_marker <- function(dos){
  mu <- rowMeans(dos, na.rm = TRUE)
  out <- dos
  for(i in seq_len(nrow(out))){
    miss <- is.na(out[i, ])
    if(any(miss)) out[i, miss] <- mu[i]
  }
  out
}

# ---- Helper: build Z and G from dosage (markers x samples) ----
build_Z_G <- function(dos){
  p <- rowMeans(dos) / 2
  keep <- p > 0 & p < 1
  dos <- dos[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  p <- p[keep]

  Z <- sweep(dos, 1, 2*p, "-")
  Z <- sweep(Z, 1, sqrt(2*p*(1-p)), "/")

  G <- tcrossprod(t(Z)) / nrow(Z)
  list(Z = Z, G = G, p = p)
}

# ---- Main processor for ONE VCF ----
process_one_vcf <- function(vcf_path, sample_missing_max = 0.40){

  message("\nProcessing: ", basename(vcf_path))

  vcf <- read.vcfR(vcf_path, verbose = FALSE)
  vcf <- make_vcf_variant_ids_unique(vcf)

  gt <- extract.gt(vcf, element = "GT", as.numeric = FALSE) # variants x samples

  # dosage: variants x samples
  dosage <- apply(gt, c(1,2), gt_to_altcount)
  storage.mode(dosage) <- "integer"

  qc_table_raw <- sort(table(as.vector(dosage), useNA = "ifany"), decreasing = TRUE)

  # drop all-missing markers
  keep_mark <- rowSums(!is.na(dosage)) > 0
  dosage1 <- dosage[keep_mark, , drop = FALSE]

  # sample missingness (computed BEFORE imputation, after dropping all-missing markers)
  sample_missing <- colMeans(is.na(dosage1))
  keep_samp <- sample_missing <= sample_missing_max
  dosage2 <- dosage1[, keep_samp, drop = FALSE]

  # recompute marker missingness after sample filter (still pre-imputation)
  marker_missing <- rowMeans(is.na(dosage2))

  # impute
  dosage_imp <- mean_impute_by_marker(dosage2)
  stopifnot(sum(is.na(dosage_imp)) == 0)

  # drop monomorphic markers
  keep_var <- apply(dosage_imp, 1, function(x) var(x) > 0)
  dosage_final <- dosage_imp[keep_var, , drop = FALSE]

  # build Z and G
  zg <- build_Z_G(dosage_final)

  list(
    source_vcf = vcf_path,

    n_markers_raw = nrow(dosage),
    n_samples_raw = ncol(dosage),

    n_markers_after_drop_all_missing = nrow(dosage1),
    n_samples_after_sample_filter = ncol(dosage2),

    n_markers_final = nrow(dosage_final),
    n_samples_final = ncol(dosage_final),

    qc_table_raw = qc_table_raw,
    marker_missing_summary = summary(marker_missing),
    sample_missing_summary = summary(sample_missing),

    sample_missing_max = sample_missing_max,
    dropped_samples = names(sample_missing)[!keep_samp],

    dosage_final = dosage_final,   # markers x samples
    Z = zg$Z,                      # markers x samples (standardized)
    G = zg$G,                      # samples x samples
    p = zg$p
  )
}

# ---- Run for all selected VCFs ----
results <- list()

for(vcf_path in vcf_files){

  obj <- process_one_vcf(vcf_path, sample_missing_max = 0.40)

  stem <- basename(vcf_path) |> str_replace("\\.vcf\\.gz$", "")
  out_file <- file.path(proc_dir, paste0(stem, "_processed.rds"))

  saveRDS(obj, out_file, compress = "xz")
  message("Saved: ", out_file)

  results[[basename(vcf_path)]] <- out_file
}

results

```
